title: A1 · Débutant
subtitle: Survival vocab — greetings, family, basic verbs, everyday objects.
focus: First 100 real French lemmas at this CEFR level. Translation, example and example_en are placeholders for now — they will be filled in one group at a time.

groups.title: Group 1 · Core vocabulary
groups.focus: 100 real French lemmas across noun / verb / adj / adv / phrase. Translation and example fields are placeholders.

groups.title: Group 2 · Corps et santé
groups.focus: Body parts, basic health and care. 40 nouns / 30 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases. Placeholder fields filled later.

groups.title: Group 3 · Nourriture et repas
groups.focus: Food, drinks, meals, kitchen items. 50 nouns / 25 verbs / 10 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 4 · Vêtements et accessoires
groups.focus: Clothes, accessories, shopping. 40 nouns / 30 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 5 · Maison et objets
groups.focus: Rooms, furniture, household objects. 40 nouns / 30 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 6 · Temps, saisons et météo
groups.focus: Time, dates, seasons, weather. 45 nouns / 25 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 7 · Transports et déplacements
groups.focus: Vehicles, travel, directions. 45 nouns / 25 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 8 · École et professions
groups.focus: School objects, study verbs, professions. 45 nouns / 25 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 9 · Nature et animaux
groups.focus: Plants, terrain, animals. 45 nouns / 25 verbs / 15 adj / 5 adv / 10 phrases.

groups.title: Group 10 · Couleurs, qualités et verbes essentiels
groups.focus: Colors, common qualities, everyday verbs. 35 nouns / 25 verbs / 20 adj / 10 adv / 10 phrases.
